# Ubuntu documentation library

> The Ubuntu documentation library is an index of documentation for Ubuntu and related Canonical projects.

## Juju
- [Juju 3.6 documentation](https://documentation.ubuntu.com/juju/3.6/llms.txt)

## Ubuntu for Developers
- [Ubuntu for Developers latest documentation](https://documentation.ubuntu.com/ubuntu-for-developers/llms.txt)

## Ubuntu Project
- [Ubuntu Project latest documentation](https://documentation.ubuntu.com/project/llms.txt)
